title: Combat Lock
description: This project syncs with LuckPerms to prohibit command usage, such as /tp, /gamemode, /rtp, etc, during combat. It is configurable to any commands, and any type of combat.
body:
## What is this project for?
This project syncs with LuckPerms to prohibit command usage, such as /tp, /gamemode, /rtp, etc, during combat. It is configurable to any commands, and any type of combat.

## Example of Usage:
![Example of usage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9a51d0572ae9277a3cc9ea5df66a3bbfa6ff40b.png)

In the picture above, an admin with permission to set their gamemode has been attacked by a spider, and is therefore unable to use their commands to switch gamemode/save them selves.

## Why would I use this Plugin?
This plugin can be used to end admin abuse and combat log.
